study_group_representative.quote: As a low-middle income and populous country with 95 million people, Vietnam faces a high risk of a severe COVID-19 outbreak

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: Vietnam deployed border control measures such as temperature screening, visa waiver/entry halting, 14-day quarantine enforcement and mandatory health declaration. [...] As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: Unlike affluent Asian countries with GDP per capita of 20-fold higher, Vietnam could not afford a community-wide testing program.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality. The country has kept the outbreak at a slow growth rate even after reporting 100 cases, with doubling time of more than 7 days

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: The country has kept the outbreak at a slow growth rate even after reporting 100 cases, with doubling time of more than 7 days, on par with Japan or Singapore
